global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with layered shapes and text elements promoting a service.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares with a call to action.

elements.label: Teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center, slightly transparent, with rounded corners, suggesting a content area.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle overlapping the larger one, also with rounded corners, indicating another content area.

elements.label: Large oval
elements.description: A large oval shape positioned in the center, adding a decorative touch to the composition.

elements.label: Medium oval
elements.description: A medium oval shape that overlaps with other elements, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle located at the top, serving as a decorative icon.

elements.label: Text block
elements.description: A text block positioned lower in the center, featuring a clear and readable font.

elements.label: Text overlay
elements.description: A smaller text overlay positioned within the main subject area, providing additional information.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline at the top, featuring bold text that captures attention.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: A clear promotional message in the center, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom with a clear call to action, encouraging users to engage.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern and minimalistic, HorizonHop UGC, special fares
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subjects are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: HorizonHop UGC, Fly smarter Special fares today, Watch now
